title: aeonium aureum
intro: Aeonium aureum, also known as the golden aeonium or golden buckwheat plant, is a type of succulent plant belonging to the Crassulaceae family. It is known for its striking golden-yellow leaves, which are a result of high levels of flavonoids. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Aeonium aureum has been traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and poultices, to treat various health issues, including skin irritations, wounds, and digestive problems.
